---
title: 'Homeless'
date: '2016-02-02T14:29:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '9002055569185136173'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />God is good to me, even when my eyes cannot see.<br /><br />God is good to me, when I doubt and I fear.<br /><br />God is good to me,<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Three years today, he struck out on his own.<br /><br />Packed one bag, headed south, leaving the world behind.<br /><br />He had no plan, no direction, just the first train out of here.<br /><br />He's been roaming around ever since.<br /><br /><br /><br />Shoppings gets much easier, when you don't have a home.<br /><br />You only want what you can take with you.<br /><br />Food, a few clothes, and a book or two.<br /><br />Things aren't needs, if you can't take them with you.<br /><br /><br /><br />Hotels, motels, camping grounds,<br /><br />Shelters, alleys, and cardboard boxes,<br /><br />He'd tried everything as a shelter for a night.<br /><br />Now this life is getting old, and so is he.<br /><br /><br /><br />It's time to come home, but he has none.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
